features.name: Spellcasting
features.description: You cast wizard spells using Intelligence, preparing them from your spellbook; you know wizard cantrips.

features.name: Ritual Adept
features.description: You can cast any spell in your spellbook that has the Ritual tag as a ritual, without preparing it.

features.name: Arcane Recovery
features.description: Once per day on a short rest, recover expended spell slots with a combined level up to half your wizard level (rounded up).

features.name: Evocation Savant
features.description: You can copy evocation spells into your spellbook for half the usual time and gold, and always have two evocation spells prepared for free.

features.name: Sculpt Spells
features.description: When you cast an evocation spell that affects others you can see, you can protect a number of them equal to 1 + the spell's level; they automatically succeed the save and take no damage from it.
